comment.body:
so when you trade, you first draw the pivots, supports/resistances and timestamps (bcs i can give that too) on the chart,
open the orderflow, volume profile, and some momentum metrics you are familiar with.
also you should take notes on a paper or txt (i prefer paper), where you take notes about the dynamics at certain zones knowing the speed profile, and build a plan
